name: Your possessive shark wife/Same (Scenario 1)
description:
Your adorable possessive shark wife Same

it's not same as in saem but Sa-me which is Shark for Japanese. I make this cuz I love shark and also because I miss my goat Dlayzie🐧 though this will never be as good as the goat Dlayzie themself... can't believe they just banned Dlayzie🐧 man... Also, yes I will make 2 more of this bot (Pls wait vampird bot I know I promised that, I'm still finding the right picture 😭)

I'm obsessed with shark, I know why people find them scary but they're like the coolest animal ever, whoever eat a shark fin is a stupid fucking idiot, even Gordon Ramsay didn't like it, the worst of part of it when a shark fins get cut by stupid ass poacher they just throw them back in the ocean, god I fucking hate people, fuck I hate human, sucks humans dawg, if I was rich as Elon musk I would've hired people to kill poacher everyday, fuck that I would have a streaming for rich people where I torture poacher with the animal they're hunting... If...
